title: Kontext Routing Envelope
description: Transport metadata for AS5 hub routing. Decoupled from business payload (Separation of Concerns). The hub routes messages using ONLY this layer without inspecting the payload. / Metadatos de transporte para enrutamiento AS5. El hub enruta mensajes usando SÓLO esta capa sin inspeccionar el payload.

tenant_id.description: Sender's tenant identifier registered in the FideX AS5 Hub. Assigned during 4-phase partner onboarding. / Identificador del tenant emisor registrado en el Hub FideX AS5.

receiver_id.description: Receiver's partner identifier in the Trading Partner Directory (TPD). Used to look up the receiver's message_endpoint and JWKS keys. / Identificador del socio receptor en el Directorio de Socios Comerciales.

document_type.description: Machine-readable document type enum. Used by the AS5 Hub to select routing rules, JSONata translation maps, and compliance hooks (e.g., SENIAT observer for GS1_INVOICE_JSON). / Enum de tipo de documento legible por máquina. Usado por el Hub para seleccionar reglas de enrutamiento y mapas de traducción JSONata.

correlation_id.description: Business correlation key linking all documents in a transaction chain (PURCHASE_ORDER → QUOTE → ORDER_CONFIRMED → ASN → INVOICE). Use the originating order number as the anchor. / Clave de correlación de negocio que enlaza todos los documentos de una cadena transaccional.
